provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: This Notice may be cited as The laws revision (specific law) notice, 2023.

provisions.title: Revised law
provisions.content: The Regulation specified in the Schedule to this Notice have been revised and published as 2023 Revised Edition and have incorporated amendments including and up to 28 th February, 2023. Schedule Revised edition, 2023 No. Title Gn. No. 1. The Parliamentary Service Regulations 395 of 2012 History of this document 10 March 2023 this version Published in Gazette of the United Republic of Tanzania 9 Commenced 02 March 2023 Assented to Related documents More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all. Free Access to the law supports the rule of law and access to justice. TanzLII partners with African Legal Information Institute and Laws.Africa , who provide it with technical support. Pocket Law Use TanzLII offline with Pocket Law .
